task_completion.description: The agent navigates to the screen to create a new log entry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new log creation form or screen is visible in the farmOS Field Kit app.

task_completion.description: The agent enters the correct name for the log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Pest check - aphids on tomatoes' is visible in the Name input field of the log form.

task_completion.description: The agent changes the log type to 'Observation'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The log type dropdown, selector, or field displays 'Observation'.

task_completion.description: The agent enters the correct note for the log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Found aphids on 3 tomato plants in row 5. Will need treatment.' is visible in the Notes or Description input area.

task_completion.description: The agent marks the log as an incomplete task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Done' or 'Completed' toggle/checkbox is in the OFF or unchecked state.

task_completion.description: The agent saves the log and verifies it appears in the Tasks list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Tasks list screen is visible and displays an entry named 'Pest check - aphids on tomatoes'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual farmOS Field Kit application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the genuine farmOS Field Kit Android app interface, not a web browser, text editor, or mockup.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to create the log.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of terminal emulators, ADB commands, or scripts being used to inject the log directly into the app's database.

integrity.description: The agent entered the text into the correct app fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required text strings appear inside the app's native input fields, rather than being pasted into a separate notepad app or overlaid on the screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target log name is exactly 'Pest check - aphids on tomatoes'. The target log type is 'Observation'. The target note is 'Found aphids on 3 tomato plants in row 5. Will need treatment.'. The log must be marked as incomplete (Done toggle/checkbox is OFF/unchecked). The final verification requires seeing this specific log entry in the main Tasks list of the farmOS Field Kit app.
